condition.inactive_tooltip: All your instructions for taking this medication have expired. The medication is completely inactive.

tooltip.high: Stock in good condition. You have enough tablets, no action is required at this time.
tooltip.low: Critical stock levels! You're approaching the alert threshold. Remember to restock soon to avoid running out.
tooltip.out: Out of stock immediately. You have no more tablets. Restock as soon as possible.
tooltip.alerts_disabled: Stock alerts are disabled for this medication because the capacity or alert threshold is set to 0. You will not receive stockout notifications. Change your settings to re-enable them.

boxes.title: Medicine boxes
boxes.restock_disabled_tooltip: The restocking button is disabled because the box capacity is 0. Change the capacity to re-enable restocking.
boxes.condition_none_tooltip: No conditions have been defined for taking these. Click here to add one in order to receive regular reminders.

calendar.weekly_help: Click on a day in the calendar to see the associated medications in a window.
calendar.delete_description: This action is irreversible. All medications and schedules associated with this calendar will be permanently discontinued.
calendar.rename_description: The new name will be visible to all users with whom you share this calendar.
calendar.delete_shared_description: You will no longer have access to this shared calendar. The calendar will remain accessible to the owner and other users.

section1.content: MediTime is a web application designed to facilitate the management of medication treatments. It allows users to create personalized calendars, receive reminders, and share schedules with loved ones or healthcare professionals. The project is developed personally by Matis Gillet (alias mtx_26), with no commercial purpose.
section1.title: 1. Who are we?

personal_data.email: Email, name, photo: via authentication (Supabase Auth).
personal_data.title: Personal data
personal_data.uid: Unique identifier: automatically generated for each user.

tech_data.device: Device and browser information (for debugging and anonymized statistics).
tech_data.title: Technical data

treatment_data.boxes: Information on the boxes (quantity, stock, packaging).
treatment_data.medicines: Drug names, dosages, frequencies, times of taking.
treatment_data.title: Data related to processing

section3.no_ads: No data is sold, shared or used for advertising purposes.
section3.reminders: Send reminders or alerts if the user has enabled notifications.
section3.sharing: Allow secure sharing with other users.
section3.stability: Improve the stability and security of the application.
section3.title: 3. How is this data used?

section4.firebase: Firebase (only for push notifications and anonymous statistics).
section4.location: The databases are located in the European Union or in GDPR compliant areas.
section4.title: 4. Where is the data stored?

section5.auth: Access to data is protected by authentication.
section5.encryption: All calendar sharing is encrypted and user-controlled.
section5.passwords: Identifiers are never visible or stored in clear text.
section5.title: 5. Sharing and security

section6.intro: In accordance with the GDPR, you can at any time:
section6.title: 6. Your rights

security.title: Account management

section1.p1: The purpose of these conditions is to define the terms of use of the MediTime application, developed personally by Matis Gillet (alias mtx_26), without profit motive.
section1.p2: By using the application, you unconditionally accept these conditions.
section1.title: 1. Purpose

section2.disclaimer: The Application is provided “as is” with no guarantee of continued availability or medical accuracy.

list.item3: Share calendars with other people (links or accounts).

section2.title: 2. Functionality

section3.conclusion: Each user is responsible for the confidentiality of their account and data.

list.item2: Acceptance of these T&Cs and the privacy policy.

section3.title: 3. Access and registration

section4.content: The source code, design, and content of MediTime are the property of Matis Gillet, unless otherwise stated. Any reproduction, distribution, or modification without authorization is prohibited.
section4.title: 4. Intellectual property

list.item3: From loss or disclosure of data due to unsecured use.

section5.p1: The application is not intended to replace medical advice. The user remains solely responsible for the use of the information displayed.
section5.p2: Under no circumstances can MediTime or its developer be held responsible:
section5.title: 5. Responsibilities

section6.conclusion: The deletion is final and cannot be undone.

list.item1: Delete your account and data via an email request;

section6.title: 6. Account Deletion

section7.content: These Terms and Conditions may be modified at any time. You will be notified of significant changes via the app or by email.
section7.title: 7. Modifications

section8.intro: For any questions regarding these conditions:
section8.title: 8. Contact

testimonials.author: Andrée C. and her grandchildren
testimonials.quote: I still refill my mom's pill box every week, but with MediTime, it's become much simpler. I can see her entire medication list at a glance, I receive reminders, and so does she. We're much more relaxed.
testimonials.title: They trust us

tour.add_calendar_content: Start by creating your first medication schedule.
tour.add_manual_content: Add a medication by entering its details.
tour.add_qr_content: Scan the QR code on the box to add it instantly.
tour.box_condition_content: Expand this section to see the conditions for taking a picture. To add one, switch to edit mode via the menu.
tour.calendar_actions_content: Click here to open the menu and discover the advanced features.
tour.calendar_grid_content: Here is your pill organizer. You will see your scheduled medication doses for the week.
tour.calendar_name_content: Give your calendar a name (e.g., 'My Medications', 'Mom').
tour.export_pdf_content: Download your calendar in PDF format to print or share.
tour.go_to_calendar_content: Let's now take a look at your calendar.
tour.ics_calendar_content: Synchronize restocking dates with your personal calendar.
tour.import_type_content: Choose how you want to start: blank, QR scan or file import.
tour.invite_user_content: Invite a doctor or a loved one by entering their email address.
tour.medicines_btn_content: Click here to manage your medications.
tour.pillbox_history_content: Check your pillbox filling history and restore a previous version if needed.
tour.public_links_content: Manage public links here to share your calendar in read-only mode.
tour.send_sms_content: You can generate a pre-filled SMS and send it to the person of your choice so that they can supply you.
tour.settings_page_content: Here you can configure stock alerts and notifications.
tour.share_btn_content: Share your calendar with your loved ones or caregivers so they can follow your treatment.
tour.share_page_content: Here you can manage access to your calendar. Invite people by email or create sharing links.
tour.shared_users_content: See here the people with whom you share this calendar.
tour.stock_alerts_content: View the list of medications that are out of stock.
tour.stock_alerts_page_content: Here you can see medications that are out of stock or soon to be sold out.
tour.stock_intro_content: This is where you manage your medication inventory.
tour.stock_settings_content: Manage alert thresholds. This setting depends on your usage: whether you have a pill organizer or if you take medication daily.
tour.submit_calendar_content: Click here to create your calendar.
tour.week_selector_content: Use this selector to change the week.
tour.welcome_content: Discover how to manage your medications simply. Follow the guide!

verify_email.instructions: Send a new verification link to your email address.
verify_email.title: Email address verification

why.desc: Because healthcare doesn't leave room for improvisation. MediTime offers you a clear, intuitive, and secure solution for tracking your treatments and those of your loved ones, day after day.
why.title: Why choose MediTime?

you_have_no_pillbox_use_history: You have no usage history for the pill organizer.
pillbox_completion_description: The stock of all medications for this week will be reduced according to your schedule. This action is irreversible.
delete_access_description: This user will no longer be able to view or modify this calendar. This action is irreversible.
delete_calendar_description: You will lose access to this calendar. The calendar will remain accessible to the owner and other users with whom it is shared.
delete_invitation_description: The invitation will be cancelled and the recipient will no longer be able to accept it.
delete_link_description: The link will be permanently removed. No one will be able to access the calendar via this link anymore, including users who have already used it.
restore_pillbox_description: This action will cancel the last preparation of the pillbox and restore the quantities in stock.
